author: Walter Kyo Csoelle

author: Lubomir Polascin

author: Lubomir Polascin

author: Lubomir Polascin

title: Acute renal failure and acute kidney injury
author: Lubomir Polascin et al.
description: Academic paper highlighting these conditions as serious medical problems requiring collaboration among specialists and often intensive hospital care, including extracorporeal elimination therapy. Available on ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/323586471_Acute_renal_failure_and_acute_kidney_injury

title: Novšie aspekty antihypertenzívnej liečby u pacientov s diabetickou nefropatiou
author: Ľubomír Polaščín et al.
description: Forum diabetologicum. Newer aspects of antihypertensive treatment in patients with diabetic nephropathy.

title: Biomarkery akútneho obličkového poškodenia (Biomarkers of acute kidney injury)
author: Ľubomír Polaščín et al.
description: Interná medicína. Overview of biomarkers related to acute kidney injury.

title: DLHODOBÁ ÚSPEŠNÁ REMISIA IDIOPATICKEJ MEMBRÁNOVEJ NEFROPATIE APLIKÁCIOU PONTICELLIHO SCHÉMY IMUNOSUPRESÍVNEJ LIEČBY
author: Ľubomír Polaščín, Monika Alaxinová, Gabriela Karasová, Jana Kalatová
description: 38. kongres Slovenskej nefrologickej spoločnosti (Program a abstrakty). Abstract concerning long-term successful remission of idiopathic membranous nephropathy using the Ponticelli immunosuppressive treatment scheme.

title: Kontinuálna renálna nahrádzajúca terapia (KRNT, CRRT) pri AOP (AKI)
author: MUDr. Ľubomír Polaščín
description: Krajský nefrologický seminár – World Kidney Day, Bratislava. Specific clinical exploration on continuous renal replacement therapy in acute kidney injury.

title: Nefrológ Polaščín: Na zlyhanie obličiek by pacient v dnešnej dobe nemal zomrieť
author: Pravda.sk (Interview s Ľubomírom Polaščínom)
description: Major medical interview published in Pravda on February 9, 2015. Discusses Dr. Polaščín's medical journey, the intersection of medicine and engineering, and the state of modern dialysis.

title: Vliv použití dialyzačního roztoku s citrátovou složkou v kyselém koncentrátu na množství použitého heparinu při dialyzačním ošetření
author: L. Polaščín
description: Academic abstract presented at the conference "Vývoj léčby a ošetřovatelské péče u pacientů s onemocněním ledvin" (CNNA). Analyzing the impact of citrate component dialysate solutions on heparin dosing.
